pi_items.source: Verified against export_result.sh line 11 and task.json description line 124 in setup_task.sh
Verified against task_utils.sh line 9 (AEROBRIDGE_ADMIN_URL), setup_task.sh line 133, and multiple environment scripts

privileged_info_summary: The task uses Aerobridge, an open-source Django-based drone/UAV fleet management system. All test data is synthetic and created programmatically in setup_task.sh using Django ORM. The scenario creates two test aircraft (RECON_TEST_A, RECON_TEST_B), two flight plans (RECON_PLAN_1, RECON_PLAN_2), and three orphaned flight logs. Log 1 (Aircraft A, created at +30min) should match Plan 1 (10:00-12:00). Log 2 (Aircraft B, created at +5 hours) should match Plan 2 (14:00-16:00). Log 3 (Aircraft A, created at +8 hours) has no matching plan. The unmatched logs report file is written to /home/ga/Documents/unmatched_logs.txt, and the Django admin panel is accessible at http://localhost:8000/admin/.
